_meta.note: Source of truth for the FFT:IVC item OVERHAUL. baseline = REAL vanilla/IVC values (Game8). proposed = our build-diversity rebalance, emitted to the modloader ItemWeaponData XML by tools/generate.py. name = NEW overhaul name (-> item.en.nxd); vanillaName kept for reference. tier = availability rank (1=earliest .. 6=poach/endgame) -- a valid 'pick this' axis, enforced by analyze.py.
_meta.knifeFormula: (PA + Speed) / 2 * WP  -- speed-scaling; knives own the fast/agile/utility niche
_meta.renameTarget: item.en.nxd (name + description). NXD round-trip mechanism: WIP.
_meta.design: Three lanes run the curve in parallel: RAW (Cutpurse/Argent Dirk/Adamant Fang), AGILE (Quicksilver 25ev / Sanguine Gauche 50ev), UTILITY (Gloomfang Blind / Hushblade Silence / Mortal Coil Doom / Dreamsever Sleep). Non-monotonic WP (5,6,5,6,7,6,9,8,10,12) makes every proc/evade knife undercut WP to pay for its gimmick.
_meta.openProcs: id4 Hushblade Silence onHitAbilityId is UNRESOLVED (not in confirmed 9/11/12 set) -- needs in-engine proc verify; identity depends on it.

items.name: Cutpurse
items.identity: Honest Ch1 starter / cheapest dual-wield enabler -- earliest unlock is its niche

items.name: Quicksilver
items.identity: Early AGILE knife -- real dodge identity (25 evade), not just 'a bit better than Cutpurse'

items.name: Gloomfang
items.identity: Anti-physical debuffer -- one hit blinds an enemy bruiser for the whole fight (only Blind source)

items.name: Hushblade
items.identity: Anti-caster -- shut an enemy mage's spellbook before they nuke (only Silence source). PROC ID UNRESOLVED.

items.name: Argent Dirk
items.identity: Clean no-strings mid-game main-hand -- reliable damage + modest dodge, no gimmick

items.name: Sanguine Gauche
items.identity: Parry-tank lifeleech -- line-max evade (50) AND every hit drains HP (Night Sword, decimal 48 = 0x30; switches dmg to PA*WP). Two reasons it's never dominated.

items.name: Adamant Fang
items.identity: Glass-cannon stat-stick -- best STRINGLESS buyable damage; pays with line-min evade (5) and zero rider

items.name: Mortal Coil
items.identity: Single-target deleter on a clock -- Doom countdown then guaranteed KO. WP8 sits UNDER Adamant Fang (pays for the proc).

items.name: Galewind
items.identity: Elemental main-hand -- top flat damage with a Wind exploit (x2 vs Wind-weak). Double-edged: Wind-absorbers heal.

items.name: Dreamsever
items.identity: Endgame capstone + burst-setup -- Sleep a target, team deletes it at +50%. Top WP but poach-gated and the Sleep self-removes, so a setup tool not a universal best.

items.name: Vagabond
items.identity: Nimble budget starter -- lowest WP but line-best early evade (12). Dodge over hit; earliest unlock.

items.name: Cleaver
items.identity: Heavy starter -- trades the Vagabond's guard for +2 raw WP. The early aggressor's pick.

items.name: Riposte
items.identity: Parry sword -- top evade of the line below Nagnarok (16). The defensive duelist; out-guards every higher-WP sword.

items.name: Reaver
items.identity: Offensive workhorse -- best early stringless raw damage (WP8), bought with zero evade. Pure damage behind a healer.

items.name: Lifedrinker
items.identity: Vampiric sustain blade -- every swing leeches HP at full PA*WP. WP undercut (6) pays for the drain. WARNING: harms wielder vs Undead. UiSE 1001.

items.name: Stormbrand
items.identity: Lightning blade -- attacks deal Lightning (x2 vs Lightning-weak; Lightning-absorbers heal it). Only Lightning sword.

items.name: Tanglethorn
items.identity: Pin-blade -- chance to inflict Immobilize (target can act but can't move). Pin runners; lock melee off your back line. Only Immobilize source. PROC ID 14 NEEDS IN-ENGINE VERIFY.

items.name: Flamberge
items.identity: Fire blade -- attacks deal Fire (anti-Undead, shreds Oiled/Ice foes; Fire-absorbers heal it). Re-themed off Sleep (knives own Sleep). Only Fire sword.

items.name: Headsman
items.identity: Glass cannon -- top raw WP at its tier (12), bought with the lowest evade of any non-Reaver sword (4). Max damage, near-zero defense.

items.name: Bulwark
items.identity: Clean workhorse -- less WP than Headsman but far higher evade (14). The safe no-drawback all-rounder.

items.name: Rimebrand
items.identity: Ice blade -- high WP, attacks deal Ice (anti-Fire-creature; Ice-absorbers heal it). Only Ice sword.

items.name: Arcanum
items.identity: Raw-power apex (WP14, highest of any sword). Mage-hybrid MA+2 rider DEFERRED until EquipBonus generator support exists.

items.name: Hexfang
items.identity: Evade-wall trickster -- line-max 50% physical evade AND on-hit Toad (target reduced to weak basic attack). Near-zero WP (3): dodge-and-disable, never damage. PROC ID 16 NEEDS IN-ENGINE VERIFY.

items.name: Nightfall
items.identity: Dark mage-knight capstone -- Dark element + absorbs MP every hit (battle-mage fuel). Solid WP11/Ev12. Still item-id 32 = Cloud's Limit weapon (function unchanged by rename). UiSE 1001.

items.name: Scoutbolt
items.identity: T1 scout's sidearm -- earliest/cheapest unlock + line-high 10% evade. Shortest range (3), lowest WP.

items.name: Knightslayer
items.identity: Assassin's bolt -- marks an elite for death. IN-GAME FINDING: proc id 21 applies BLIND not Death, so switched to Doom (id 11, confirmed) = a countdown to certain KO. Only Doom crossbow.

items.name: Arbalest
items.identity: Raw stringless workhorse and the ONLY Range-5 crossbow. Best rider-free WP of its era + unique reach; the clean PA*WP sniper.

items.name: Venombolt
items.identity: Attrition tool -- only Poison crossbow. WP undercuts Arbalest and gives up Range-5, so the DoT IS the value; best vs high-HP/fleeing targets. Poison proc 22 confirmed live.

items.name: Pitchbolt
items.identity: Combo-setup bolt -- IN-GAME FINDING: proc id 101 applies OIL (not Immobilize as the panel guessed). Oil doubles Fire damage the target takes; pairs with any Fire attacker. Line-high 8% evade. Only Oil source.

items.name: Siegebolt
items.identity: Endgame raw-power capstone -- top crossbow WP (11), no rider. At PA9+ it out-damages bows on a strength build; surrenders all utility for damage.

items.name: Skirmisher
items.identity: T1 light scout -- HIGHEST evade in the line (20) + earliest/cheapest. Shortest range (5), lowest WP. The nimble dodge-opener.

items.name: Windrunner
items.identity: T2 dodge duelist -- 2nd-best evade (15) + colorless = safe vs any element-absorber. True sidegrade to Frostarc (same WP5: evade+safety vs element).

items.name: Frostarc
items.identity: T2 first elemental -- attacks deal Ice (anti-Fire-creature; Ice-absorbers heal it). Trades Windrunner's evade for element at equal WP5.

items.name: Stormarc
items.identity: T3 elemental -- attacks deal Lightning (anti-armor/robotic; Lightning-absorbers heal it). +1 WP over Frostarc, different element coverage.

items.name: Skypiercer
items.identity: T4 the REACH bow -- innate Wind + longest non-capstone range (7); arcs over cover, picks off fliers/cliff-campers. Glass: 0 evade, all reach.

items.name: Silentstring
items.identity: T3 caster-lock / control bow -- Silence on hit shuts enemy mages at range. WP7 + 10 evade. Renamed from filler Mythril Bow. Silence proc 10 confirmed live.

items.name: Huntress
items.identity: T5 marksman / mid-evade owner -- WP9 + 10 evade, earlier than the capstones. Out-dodges Tempest, out-shoots the mids. Fixes vanilla 'Yoichi dominates Artemis'.

items.name: Tempest
items.identity: T6 AGILE capstone -- top sustained WP (12) that STILL keeps 5 evade: heavy damage on light feet. The speed-build DPS capstone vs Seraph's glass cannon.

items.name: Seraph
items.identity: T6 RAW+REACH capstone -- max WP (15) + max range (8, RANGE-8 CEILING TEST) + innate Holy (anti-Undead). 0 evade = pure glass cannon.
